sharedPost.text:
Damien Lanceley is a British actor and stunt performer primarily known for his work in independent film, specializing in action-heavy and "tough guy" roles. Based in Blackpool, England, he has built a niche playing villains, gangsters, and warriors.
  
​Background and Specializations

​Lanceley is recognized for his athletic, muscular build—a result of his dedication to bodybuilding and MMA training. These skills allow him to perform his own stunts and bring a physical intensity to his characters.

He is often cast in roles that require an intimidating presence, such as:
  
​Antagonists: Villains and henchmen.
  
​Historical/Fantasy Warriors: Vikings and medieval fighters.

​Modern Crime Roles: Gangsters and "bad boy" characters.
  
​Notable Projects

​His filmography consists of several feature-length and short films within the crime and thriller genres:
  
​**Ballistic (2024): A feature film distributed via Amazon, where he plays the character Max. 
 
​Geezers (2024): Plays the role of "Shotgun Jimmy."  

​**Killing Rainbow (2023): Appeared in this Chris Cutler-directed project.  

​Choc-Chips (2024): Played the character Alfie.  

​Blink Time: Appeared in this production by Invisible Sword Productions.  

​Personal Attributes

​Skills: Trained in MMA, boxing, and bodybuilding. He is also noted for his ability to perform various accents, including Irish, Russian, and Polish. 
 
​Training: He has a background in "Action for Screen" training, focusing on the technical requirements of stunt work and on-camera combat.

CASTING CALL – NON-SPEAKING PRODUCT VIDEO

Roles:
Looking for 6 men and women, ages 25–50, all ethnicities welcome. Product is a type of food storage bag. Non-union. 

Project Details:
This is a simple, non-speaking product shoot focused on natural, everyday usage in a home environment.

Rate:
$30/hour (minimum 4-hour pay = $120)

Location:
Vancouver and/or Langley
Some roles will require 2 shoot days (one in each location).
One role will require 1 shoot day in Langley only. 

Shoot Dates:
TBD – Scheduling is flexible. We are aiming to film within the next 1–2 weeks and will coordinate based on availability.

Submission Instructions:
Please email the following to Ecomfilmworks@gmail.com
- Recent photos
- Any relevant experience (optional)
- General availability over the next 2 weeks

Subject Line: Casting – Food Storage

items.text:
METHOD OF MADNESS - SHORT FILM CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for UNION ACTORS to be cast in our project which will be filming in MAY 20, 21, and 22. 

The deadline for self-tapes have been extended to Friday April 17th at 11:59PM. Callbacks will be held on Monday April 20 (6:00-8:00PM) and Tuesday April 21 (TBD).

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to gomethod. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please email methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com for any inquires.

We are looking for both **union and non-union** actors.

Character Bios:

NAOMI (woman, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Naomi is a woman in her 30s who dreams of having a family. However, madly in love with her husband, she allows herself to prioritize his dreams, sticking by him as he tries to make it as an actor. Her excitement for him however, dies when he begins bringing his role home. Her love turns to fear, as the man she cares for so dearly becomes unrecognizable. The pain and heartbreak of slowly losing him to madness eating at her.

JEREMY (man, 35-45, any ethnicity)

Jeremy is a man in his 30s determined to build a life for his family. Desperate to make it as an actor, and truly believing he will, he holds back on beginning his family. A sense of responsibility to impress, both as a husband and onset, pushes him to his limits. As he dedicates himself to his role, his love for his family and his craft morphs into obsession. The concept of a perfect performance consumes him until the madness of his character begins creeping into his life.

BAR TENDER (woman, 20-30, any ethnicity)

Tired and ready to go home, the bartender at a rundown bar is confused when a woman comes in asking to watch the Oscars. However, curiosity gets the best of her as she accepts the request. Her attention suddenly pulled to the stars on screen.

NEWS ANCHOR (Any, 30-40, any ethnicity)

The News anchor is a professional, who is highly skilled as a journalist. With a secondary passion for film and television, they are excited to report on the nominees for the academy awards. However, of all the performances they were especially moved by the performance of one particular actor, Jeremy Leonard.

Please send your information to our email: methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please provide your introduction (who you are, and what role you are interested in), headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email and you will shortly get a response for your self tapes to be sent in. 

Keep in mind that ALL self tapes are DUE by April 17 @ 11:59PM. The callbacks will be on April 20th and April 21th. The filming dates are all day May 20, 21, and 22. 

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. We hope to hear from you :)

items.text:
Women fashion brand casting.

Mayfig, a new Canadian-designed stretch denim brand, is looking for 2 female models.

We’re looking for:
• Size 26” (1 model)
• Size 28” (1 model)
• Height: 5’8” – 5’10”
• Age: 20–35

What you’ll be doing:
• Fit testing (help us perfect the jeans)
• Editorial & Catalogue photo shoots

Details:
• $40/hour
• Majority of work in Surrey, with some shoots in Vancouver
• Ongoing opportunities with a growing Canadian brand

If you (or someone you know) fit the description, email Luke@jnalvit.com, or DM with your measurements, height, and a few recent photos. Those selected will be contacted directly.

topComments.text: You should also include a model in the 50’s who could look fabulous in your denim.

WARSZAWA - FILM FABULARNY - KOSMONAUTA

DZIEŃ ZDJĘCIOWY - 21.04
CHARAKTERYZACJA (mężczyźni) - 18.04

Do filmu fabularnego szukam epizodystów do jednej sceny w roli fotoreporterów / dziennikarzy. 
- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 270 zł (dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: K21 epizod
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę (jeżeli to zgłoszenie do epizodu) wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie!

items.text:
CASTING DLA FANÓW KULINARIÓW 🍽️ 🧚🏻‍♀️
WIELE RÓL, zajrzyjcie koniecznie👀

Zapraszamy do udziału w castingu dla firmy cateringowej👌

Szukamy osób z dobrą dykcją, wyrazistą mimiką i umiejętnością grania „całym ciałem”. Liczy się luz, humor, naturalność i plastyczność w grze aktorskiej 🎭

 KOGO SZUKAMY?

1. JUSTYNA – mama i menadżerka (35–40 lat)
2. KASIA – ekspertka kulinarna (ok. 30 lat)
3. LIDIA – świadoma redukująca (40–50 lat), naturalna sylwetka
4. PIOTR – 30–40 lat, lekki zarost, zadbany
5. RAFAŁ – ok. 35 lat, normalna sylwetka, „pan z brzuszkiem”
6. BŁAŻEJ – ok. 30 lat, wysportowany sceptyk, tradycjonalista
7. KAROL – 45+, budowlaniec, silny, postawny

🐶 Jeśli masz zwierzę (pies/kot) – koniecznie dodaj informację i zdjęcie w zgłoszeniu

 

TERMINY

⏰ Nadsyłanie self-tape: do 16.04 (godz. 18:00)
🎬 Zdjęcia: 28–30.04.2026

SELFTAPE

1. WIZYTÓWKA
Przedstaw się i pokaż swoją energię ✨

2. SCENA AKTORSKA
Opowiedz:

jaką kuchnię lubisz najbardziej i dlaczego
zabawną sytuację z gotowania (emocje mile widziane 😄)
👉 Zakończ zdaniem:
„Na szczęście nie zawsze trzeba gotować – dobrze, że jest catering!”

 

 DODATKOWO

nagranie wejścia do domu/mieszkania
zdjęcia zwierząt (jeśli posiadasz)
                                                                                          Skontaktujemy się wybranymi osobami! 
                                                                                            Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🔥

Tylko kompletne zgłoszenia zawierające : imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer kontaktowy, wymiary, wizytówka + scenka, zdjęcie portretowe oraz sylwetki 🙏🏻

CASTING@unagimedia.pl
Tytuł: viking+ nazwa postaci

Miłego dnia! 🌺

items.text:
Hiya!

Did you know Rising Star Talent Agency (http://www.risingstartalentagency.com) and 
The Other Side of Music Podcast (http://www.theothersideofmusicpodcast.com) provide unique marketing services. 
Our EPK’s (electronic press kit) are customized to feature you, 1 sheet that’s it! 
Doing a podcast with us? You’ll walk away with short and long form marketing content that’s yours forever. 

We also include a free write up with suggestions of how/where you can use your new marketing materials, and a free Entertainment resume template to showcase performances, speaking engagements, book signings, acting, etc.

Are there fees? Yes (we can’t give our work away for free. That’s like asking a pizza shop for free pizza).

EPK-$150
Podcast Marketing packages starting at $97
You’ll potentially make your money back from one show, couple book sales, speaking engagement, acting call…
DM me or robin@risingstartalentagency.com 
Call/text: 412-980-7782
Investing in yourself is wonderful

items.summary:
Hiya!

Did you know Rising Star Talent Agency (http://www.risingstartalentagency.com) and 
The Other Side of Music Podcast (http://www.theothersideofmusicpodcast.com) provide unique marketing services. 
Our EPK’s (electronic press kit) are customized to feature you, 1 sheet that’s it! 
Doing a podcast with us? You’ll walk away with short and long form marketing content that’s yours forever. 

We also include a free write up with suggestions of how/where you can use your new marketing materials, and a free Entertainment resume template to showcase performances, speaking engagements, book signings, acting, etc.

Are there fees? Yes (we can’t give our work away for free. That’s like asking a pizza shop for free pizza).

EPK-$150
Podcast Marketing packages starting at $97
You’ll potentially make your money back from one show, couple book sales, speaking engagement, acting call…
DM me or robin@risingstartalentagency.com 
Call/text: 412-980-7782
Investing in yourself is wonderful

topComments.text: I have a suggestion for you beauty. There’s an app you can use if you’re needing to read for teleprompting called BIGVU , it’ll help a lot so that you’re not looking away during your takes. There’s others as well but that’s the one I use on my phone at least.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – *WE STAND DIVIDED*
📣 Seeking: *PETER / PATRICIA* (Supporting Role)

🎭 All genders | Playing age: 40s–70s | White British/European

A near-future UK drama exploring faith, power, and humanity under a far-right government. Written & directed by *Shuhel Ahmed*, whose previous short screened at *15 international festivals* (incl. 1 BAFTA-qualifying) and won *9 awards worldwide*.

*About the role:*

A hospital manager — colleague and confidant to Ibrahim, our lead. Grounded, humane, and conflicted, torn between moral duty and institutional pressure. A crucial supporting role with real emotional weight.

📅 *Shoot date: Sunday 3rd May 2026 (1 day only)*

💰 Unpaid — expenses covered + FREE showreel footage & headshot photography included

*To apply:*

📧 Email us: vistacinereels@gmail.com

🔗 Or apply via Mandy: https://mandy.com/aa/project/3094303/we-stand-divided/

Share widely — let's find our Peter or Patricia! 🙌

items.text:
**Casting – short stage performance (The Perils, Concordia Drama Award finalist)**
I’m casting two actors for a short staged scene from my play *The Perils*, selected as a finalist for a Concordia drama award.

**Roles:**

**George / Lord Millflower, male, mid-20s**
American-born Black earl. Genuine, warm, and hearty, with a natural openness that comes under strain in the scene.

**Maryon, female, late teens to early 20s**
Gentlewoman of rank. Polite and composed on the surface, but driven by genuine rage and grief.

**Scene Synopsis:**
Set during the Indian Rebellion, the scene centres on a private conversation between George and Maryon. What begins as a controlled exchange turns into pressure and a test of loyalty. A previous scene from the play, performed at 4th Space, can be viewed here: [[[[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7l2Zk8pKrno&t=2s](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7l2Zk8pKrno&t=2s&fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSlpnQWszTlIzSmx3VnNjcXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4tQg74TX1gHMoJZ_O-EHu3Lqz5AlLAygTJNxZryBgwNJB98XxY8dEAknU8Wg_aem_NujChIJx4wpi_4PFsnBnQQ)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D7l2Zk8pKrno%26t%3D2s%26fbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSlpnQWszTlIzSmx3VnNjcXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR78pKq6aLfXTh5mmLplr5Ky6QoWchMJ2BhcGCJf6sx-GjsXBgQOuI8MJFrStA_aem_d9AJmgPIJMeQjhnOB8Cf0w&h=AT5SEjfus8HT9nkAlaik1axSsfgkrAfcbMz5opMFBVaHEzJ0Px8CvFFJfTZ-rrwkSjkPCHbXkzR_0Fe7SaArmhyp7EzKi4415kI6iFHT86z6hoETaGaZbOYqst23Mu1Vs7NY&__tn__=-U-UK-R&c[0]=AT78OP_53UJLLNKLYoBR_JuyBFZFwzOpc3UbmF5RztTn3sbmiA_uItxpiWos6ZsbnZHE7xeB_qMJJtQazFqtg6EA48u4PCgwGUlyO5qiB3RMxLyajdozHWW_shQrJdm5_9LrsmLOzZqCdy1jzD8r1FP66dw_oWZdfS8EiQF0mP179v4)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D7l2Zk8pKrno%26t%3D2s%26fbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSlpnQWszTlIzSmx3VnNjcXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4tQg74TX1gHMoJZ_O-EHu3Lqz5AlLAygTJNxZryBgwNJB98XxY8dEAknU8Wg_aem_NujChIJx4wpi_4PFsnBnQQ&h=AT5SEjfus8HT9nkAlaik1axSsfgkrAfcbMz5opMFBVaHEzJ0Px8CvFFJfTZ-rrwkSjkPCHbXkzR_0Fe7SaArmhyp7EzKi4415kI6iFHT86z6hoETaGaZbOYqst23Mu1Vs7NY&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT78OP_53UJLLNKLYoBR_JuyBFZFwzOpc3UbmF5RztTn3sbmiA_uItxpiWos6ZsbnZHE7xeB_qMJJtQazFqtg6EA48u4PCgwGUlyO5qiB3RMxLyajdozHWW_shQrJdm5_9LrsmLOzZqCdy1jzD8r1FP66dw_oWZdfS8EiQF0mP179v4)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D7l2Zk8pKrno%26t%3D2s%26fbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSlpnQWszTlIzSmx3VnNjcXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR7oUX7o5YBFRw5OGXUFLrcKQKyFgO1QiQVM9Kc7MpCDILL9ctE66JdghCm6nA_aem_Hm7QhBZ9i6aP9k9rd3TNiw&h=AT5SEjfus8HT9nkAlaik1axSsfgkrAfcbMz5opMFBVaHEzJ0Px8CvFFJfTZ-rrwkSjkPCHbXkzR_0Fe7SaArmhyp7EzKi4415kI6iFHT86z6hoETaGaZbOYqst23Mu1Vs7NY&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT78OP_53UJLLNKLYoBR_JuyBFZFwzOpc3UbmF5RztTn3sbmiA_uItxpiWos6ZsbnZHE7xeB_qMJJtQazFqtg6EA48u4PCgwGUlyO5qiB3RMxLyajdozHWW_shQrJdm5_9LrsmLOzZqCdy1jzD8r1FP66dw_oWZdfS8EiQF0mP179v4)

**Details:**
Location: 4th Space, Concordia University, Montreal
Date: Late April. April 28, 12:00 to 13:30 is one of the possible times
Format: Live staged performance, approximately 10 minutes
The event is open to the public and will also be live-streamed and made available through the 4th Space YouTube channel.

**Production:**
Student production at Concordia University
Non-union
No monetary compensation
Transportation and food provided for the performance day and rehearsals
Rehearsal schedule is flexible

clid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSlpnQWszTlIzSmx3VnNjcXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4m4w0S6S90nsf2iFvWdBWZpS-QoewisbW6bzmq2jIMk6pmIhEOUONgYyTSWw_aem_GtB1y5RuKwMbxzuJdoPI2A&h=AT5SEjfus8HT9nkAlaik1axSsfgkrAfcbMz5opMFBVaHEzJ0Px8CvFFJfTZ-rrwkSjkPCHbXkzR_0Fe7SaArmhyp7EzKi4415kI6iFHT86z6hoETaGaZbOYqst23Mu1Vs7NY&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT78OP_53UJLLNKLYoBR_JuyBFZFwzOpc3UbmF5RztTn3sbmiA_uItxpiWos6ZsbnZHE7xeB_qMJJtQazFqtg6EA48u4PCgwGUlyO5qiB3RMxLyajdozHWW_shQrJdm5_9LrsmLOzZqCdy1jzD8r1FP66dw_oWZdfS8EiQF0mP179v4)

**Details:**
Location: 4th Space, Concordia University, Montreal
Date: Late April. April 28, 12:00 to 13:30 is one of the possible times
Format: Live staged performance, approximately 10 minutes
The event is open to the public and will also be live-streamed and made available through the 4th Space YouTube channel.

**Production:**
Student production at Concordia University
Non-union
No monetary compensation
Transportation and food provided for the performance day and rehearsals
Rehearsal schedule is flexible

If you are interested, please get in touch here or on Instagram @gamadbayar.

**CASTING ACTORS** in the Tri-State area to portray on camera **TALKING HEAD EXPERTS**

A new series is now casting **ACTORS** in the Tri-State area to portray on camera **TALKING HEAD EXPERTS** for a chilling new development project.

*This gripping series uncovers true events so terrifying, they feel ripped straight from a horror film, but actually happened!!*

**WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR**

Actors who can convincingly portray 

Historians / Paranormal Investigators / Folklorists / Journalists

**MUST HAVES**

Strong on camera presence

Natural, grounded delivery (documentary style)

Ability to engage the audience and be a compelling storyteller

Playing age range late 30's - mid 50's

**SHOOT DETAILS**

Non-union

Paid opportunity

**Must be available to travel and film in Stamford, CT for approx. 2 hours (exact date TBD, but likely w/o 4/27)**

**TO SUBMIT**

Please send the below to [julia.jenkins@itv.com](mailto:julia.jenkins@itv.com)

Name, age & location

Recent photo

Resume / relevant experience

Any on camera reel or media links (if available)

items.text:
🚨 CASTING CALL - COMEDIC, ENERGETIC, ORIGINAL MUSICAL 🚨 

SIGMA ACAPELLA

Non-Equity, Profit-Share - Vancouver, Local

Full breakdown and submission details:
https://www.vancouveractorsguide.com/auditions/sigma-acapella-0

Everyone is welcome to submit but we would like to especially encourage LGBTQ+ actors! We also currently have more Male-Presenting roles to cast. Open to new actors.

"When the University’s development plans involve the destruction of all “degenerate" and "unnecessary” clubs and societies, one Frat-Star and his house of Himbos must team up with a Theater Dad and his underdog squad of Theater Kids in order to save the only home they've ever known, and maybe get a little cultured on the way. An original musical that revisits the true, wholesome meaning of “boys being boys” and the endearingly unhinged quality of drama majors, Sigma Acapella promises laughs, songs, dance and romance!"

CASTING CALL / PAID / Non-Union

Looking for four diverse young talents for a two-day video production in showcasing community infrastructure and services. Video requiring natural, authentic interactions representing local residents. Non-speaking roles.

Each select talent would be expected to be available for half day over the two day schedule. Please indicate your availability in your response.

Desired Attributes:

  • Non-union

  • Open to all ethnicities

  • Children aged 6-12

  • Available April 27-28 (subject to change) in Lower Mainland

  • Comfortable with professional video production environment

Usage:

  • Municipal marketing and promotional materials in Canada

  • Perpetual

Budget:

  • $450 / person (up to 5 hours)

Apply @ go.opencast.ca/casting/CSC by Apr 17, 2026

Questions? info@opencast.ca

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — FILMING SATURDAY, APRIL 25TH IN VANCOUVER**

Fourthframe Media is casting for our YouTube social experiment series — unscripted episodes where real people debate, deceive, and compete for a cash prize.

If you've seen Jubilee on YouTube, you know the vibe. We're building something like that right here in Vancouver.

**We're shooting 4 episodes this Saturday and need people for:**
1. 🥩 **6 Vegans vs 1 Secret Meat Eater** — Are you vegan? Or can you fake it? One meat-eater hides among real vegans. If the group catches them, they split the prize. If the liar survives, they take it all.
2. 💰 **Can We Match Your Salary to Your Face?** — People guess each other's income based on first impressions and short conversations. How much does appearance really say about what you earn?
3. 🔀 **Who Is Not a Girl?** — Judges have conversations with contestants without seeing them and decide who's a girl and who's not. Don't worry about your voice; energy and persuasion are your only tools.
4. 💔 **Who Has It Harder — Men or Women?** — An honest, emotional conversation between men and women about the struggles each side faces. No financial debates. Just real talk.

**Details:** 
Location📍: Vancouver, BC 
Date 📅: Saturday, April 25th, 2026 

**🎥 This is volunteer-based. Winners take home a cash prize. **
**🙅 No acting experience needed — just be yourself and bring energy.**

**Apply here:** [https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting](https://www.fourthframemedia.com/casting)

Follow us on YouTube/Instagram/TikTok to see our latest episodes.

Instagram: [https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia](https://www.instagram.com/4thframemedia)
YouTube: [https://www.youtube.com/@4thframemedia](https://www.youtube.com/@4thframemedia)
TikTok: [https://www.tiktok.com/@4thframemedia2](https://www.tiktok.com/@4thframemedia2)

Know someone who'd be perfect? Tag them or share this post.

#vancouver #socialexperiment #4thframemedia #JubileeStyle #RealVsFake #jubilee

items.text:
Looking for roles local to Portsmouth

Hi everyone,

My name’s Jordan – I’m 6ft4, 134kg, and currently wrapping up on a short film where I’ve been playing a pretty intense role as a serial killer dealing with some heavy psychological issues. It’s been a great experience and the crew have been really happy with what I’ve brought to the role, which has given me the push to look for more roles. I have also finished a second short film with a smaller role as an alcoholic. 

Once filming’s finished I’ll be able to put together a short showreel, but in the meantime I’m keen to get involved in more projects around Portsmouth or nearby. I feel I bring a strong, grounded presence on screen and I’m open to pretty much any kind of role.

I’m still building experience, so I’m just genuinely eager to get stuck into another project and keep developing.

If anyone’s casting or needs someone, feel free to drop me a message

items.text:
🎥Need Crew🎥

Hi, I’m looking for a crew  for my Short Folk Horror film ‘the trees’ 

This a small project for my media production course at Stratford upon Avon collage, it will be a 2-3 day shoot, in Worcestershire area

It will be 9-10 May on the weekend

Lunch  provided

THIS IS A NON PAID ROLE

Brief synopsis -  A journalist gets invited to a big ceremony in the woods when he arrive he realises that they are cannibals and need him for there big festival because he has been damaging the environment

I would need a Director of Photography/ Camera operator, camrea will be provided, for the shoot but if you have any ideas for gear let me know.

If there is anyone who would like to come and help me out (lighting, sound ecg) please email me all help would be amazing

items.summary:
🎥Need Crew🎥

Hi, I’m looking for a crew  for my Short Folk Horror film ‘the trees’ 

This a small project for my media production course at Stratford upon Avon collage, it will be a 2-3 day shoot, in Worcestershire area

It will be 9-10 May on the weekend

Lunch  provided

THIS IS A NON PAID ROLE

Brief synopsis -  A journalist gets invited to a big ceremony in the woods when he arrive he realises that they are cannibals and need him for there big festival because he has been damaging the environment

I would need a Director of Photography/ Camera operator, camrea will be provided, for the shoot but if you have any ideas for gear let me know.

If there is anyone who would like to come and help me out (lighting, sound ecg) please email me all help would be amazing 

Thank you so much for reading please email me at 

Charlie.pack21@gmail.com

Thanks!

items.text:
Casting French-speaking teens for educational videos!

If you are or know a 14-21 year old who speaks French FLUENTLY, can work in central London and who can speak confidently and enthusiastically in front of a camera then please apply!

We will be filming on one weekend this summer (date TBC). We pay around £40-50 per video which is usually around 2 hours of filming time.

To apply send a 30-60 second video in French telling us about you and why you'd be great for this role to rhiggins@scholastic.co.uk.

Please pass this on to anyone who may be interested.

Merci beaucoup !

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'CASTING FRENCH- FRENCH-SPEAKING TEENS FOR EDUCATIONAL VIDEOS YOUNG PEOPLE AGED BETWEEN 14 AND 21 YEARS OLD REQUIREMENTS: native French speaker (from any French French-speaking country) who can travel to London for a day's filming. Interested? Send a 30-second audition video telling us who you are and why you'd be great for this project to rhiggins@scholastic.co.uka as soon as possible. This isa paid role.'

items.text:
DANCERS NEEDED — ONLINE CASTING

Professional male and female dancers are wanted for a summer contract in Harbin, China.

Requirements:
• Female dancers — 175 cm+
• Male dancers — 185 cm+

Contract period:
June 1 – August 15, 2026

Contract includes:
• 1 month of rehearsals
• 45 show days

Work schedule:
• 2 production shows daily (50 minutes each)
• 1 promotional show daily (25 minutes)

Total salary:
• USD 5,000 for the full contract period (including rehearsals)

The company provides:
• Meals
• Accommodation
• Work visa
• Round-trip flight
• Medical insurance

HOW TO APPLY

Send your promo materials to: [igorpikkel@gmail.com](mailto:igorpikkel@gmail.com)

Include:
• CV (resume) in English
• Portrait and full-length photos
• Individual demo video (YouTube link)

Questions: +380 67 437 74 94 (Viber / WhatsApp / Telegram)

Contact person: Igor Pikkel

items.text:
Dzień dobry,

Do spotu reklamowego szukam polskiego George’a Clooneya :)

**Mężczyzna 45-50**

Narrator i twarz projektu. Naukowiec. Mentorskie ciepło i twardość. Lekki zarost. 

**Dwa spoty 1 dzień zdjęciowy**. 

Konieczne doświadczenie w rolach mówionych

**Nagrania śląsk -  1 dzień 27-30 kwietnia lub 4-6 maja do ustalenia**

**Stawka: 4500 zł**

Zgłoszenia z dopiskiem Clooney na ludzie@przedmarancza.pl

items.text:
Warszawa plany filmowe od maja:
Nabór do bazy.
Agencja Aktorska Abe Studio poszukuje statystów kobiet i mężczyzn 18-80 lat do nowego szpiegowskiego filmu fabularnego .
KOGO SZUKAMY :
- osób rosyjskojęzycznych do (małych epizodów) oraz statystów (nr 1 )
-osób o urodzie semickiej(żydowskiej)
(nr 2 )
- oraz oczywiście statystów Polaków (nr 3)
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać :
Imię i nazwisko 
Wiek
Nr kontaktowy 
Zdjęcia (twarz, sylwetka)

Zgłoszenia wysyłamy na abestudio2026@gmail.com
z dopiskiem w tytule (nr 1 lub nr 2 lub nr 3)

items.text:
**JELENIA GÓRA / SZKLARSKA PORĘBA**

**Plan zdjęciowy – JESTED, CZECHY**

**13 -14 -15 kwietnia**

 

Do filmu fabularnego osadzonego w latach 70tych pod roboczym tytułem „Kosmonauta” o znanym Polaku, **szukam Statystów**:

 

**13 / 14 / 15 KWIETNIA:**

**- STAND IN – **szczupli mężczyźni do 180 cm. Na stand inach ustawia się światło zamiast aktorów

13.04 dojazd do Jested we własnym zakresie na 6:20. Tutaj szukam panów z autem, którzy zabiorą jeszcze jedną osobę. Szukam 2 panów.

14.04 i 15.04 – transport z Jeleniej Góry. Również w roli wojskowych.

**Stawka 220 zł za dzień + zwrot kosztów paliwa**

 

**14 i 15 KWIETNIA:**

 - **WOJSKOWI –** mężczyźni ok. 18-50 lat – **na 14 i 15 kwietnia **(może być 1 dzień lub 2)

Zapewniamy transport z Jeleniej Góry.

14.04 wyjazd o 4:00 rano. Zdjęcia do ok. 16:30. **Stawka 180 zł**

15.04 wyjazd o 12:00. Zdjęcia do ok. północy. **Stawka 180 zł**

 

**Płatności gotówką po planie.**

 

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

** **

**Wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

**MĘŻCZYŹNI:**

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy

obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką ,wygolone boki i kark, wycięte

wzorki na włosach oraz nienaturalne kolory oraz farbowane np. na czarny.

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko

 

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **JJ 14/15**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: **ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'POD TYTUŁEM agencja agencjacastingowa castingowa n'

A barber returns to Fleet Street with revenge on his mind. A pie shop owner sees an opportunity she can’t resist… and together, they create something unforgettable. 🫣

We are proud to be bringing Stephen Sondheim’s Sweeney Todd to life in a bold, deliciously dark musical.

Come and have a slice of the pie… 🥧

🎟️: https://gladstonetheatre.org.uk/events/sweeney-todd/

The team behind The Dog House is making a brand new BBC series about childhood friendship and we’re looking for kids aged 5 to 8 who are finding it hard to make friends. If this sounds like your child - or someone you know - we’re filming in July/August, 2026 and would love to hear from you.

Apply at: https://bemyfriend.tv/

items.text:
Do kolejnych odcinków 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujacych ról:

1. Mikołaj Rudnicki (23) – Z bogatej rodziny, typ bananka, co myśli, ze zawsze dostanie to czego chce. Urażona duma, kompleksy. Studiuje psychologie. Prace licencjacką sobie kupuje, ale musi zaliczyć praktyki w ośrodku. Umie grać dobrze wychowanego. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 27., 28. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1800 zł netto za całość

2. Szcześniak (17) – współlokator Igiego. Z początku nie wydaje go dyrekcji, ale jak już wychodzi zbrodnia, współpracuje. Zna sekrety kumpla, ale nie wszystkie.

Data: 28. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Wara (27) – Diler, który nie ma skrupułów, chce tylko zarobić. Nawet kiedy widać, że jego towar (fentanyl) niszczy zdrowie Kupca. Chce tylko zmniejszyć wyrok, znał się z Igim z transakcji. Polubił go, ale dla niego liczy się biznes.

Daty: 27. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

4. Kupiec (22) – Chłopak zniszczony przez fentanyl. Ma już problemy z oddychaniem, widać z daleka, ze z jego zdrowiem jest coś nie tak. Ma duszności, potrzebna mu pomoc

Data: 27. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

5. Marcin Kowalik (38) – kurier, przystojny, kochanek Pani Sobczak, fałszywie oskarżony o skłonności pedofilskie, zostaje pobity w parku 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 700 zł netto

6. Zbigniew Zawadzki (65) – razem z żoną uprawia na emeryturze nordic walking, odważny, sprawny, razem z żoną przepędzają napastników, którzy pobili Marcina 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Filip Grodzki (26) – pewny siebie, przekonany o słuszności polowania na pedofili, należy do grupy tropiącej pedofili, razem z Krzysztofem organizuje akcję pobicia Marcina. Chętnie tatuaże.

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto

8. Krzysztof Pawlak (27) – od niedawna na grupie tropiącej pedofili, razem z Filipem pobił Marcina, ma wyrzuty sumienia po brutalnym pobiciu, myślał, że inaczej to będzie wyglądać.

Daty: 30. kwietnia i 01. maja
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

9. Jarosław Sobczak (42) – przedsiębiorca, prowadzi firmę kurierską z żoną. Gdy dowiaduje się o romansie żony, próbuje zepsuć reputację kochanka. Zleca wygenerowania fałszywych dowodów świadczących o skłonnościach pedofilskich kochanka żony. Nie przewidział, że kochanek zostaje ciężko pobity 

Data: 29. kwietnia 
Stawka: 600 zł netto

10. Lekarz (56) – lekarz prowadzący przypadek Marcina, ubrany w fartuch lekarski, starszy mężczyzna, z wyglądu wygląda na osobę doświadczoną w swoim fachu 

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.title: WARSZAWA!

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – EPIZOD AKTORSKI – CHŁOPIEC 9-11 LAT**

 

Do filmu fabularnego szukam chłopca 7-11 lat. Naturalnego, ujmującego, z charakterem: „słodki łobuziak”, energiczny, trochę „do przodu”, z ulicznym vibe’em (hip-hop, rytm). Nie szukam „reklamowego” typu. To bardzo poruszająca rola. Mile widziani chłopcy z doświadczeniem w filmach/serialach fabularnych. Krótkie włosy będą atutem, ale nie są warunkiem.

Rola przewiduje ok. 3 dni zdjęciowe, w interakcji z głównymi bohaterami.

Casting będzie dwuetapowy:

1.    selekcja na podstawie nadesłanych materiałów,

2.    zaproszenie wybranych chłopców na casting do studia w Warszawie.

Casting i zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie – preferowani chłopcy z Warszawy i okolic.

**Zgłoszenia przyjmuję do poniedziałku 20.04 do godz.: 10:00**

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **CHŁOPIEC**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost + informacja o doświadczeniu przed kamerą**

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

Krótkie włosy będą atutem, ale nie są warunkiem. zadanie dni zdjęciowe, w interakcji z głównymi bohaterami. zgłoszenia przyjmuję poniedziałku 20.04 (10:00). Preferowani chłopcy z Warszawy okolic. ZDJĘCIE TWARZY selfie dziennym świetle, na wprost, kolorowe, bez filtrów ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI aktualne zdjęcie calej sylwetki ZGŁOSZENIA NA: ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl w tytule: CHŁOPIEC do 20.04 （10：00） Więcej szczegółów w treści posta'

items.text:
CASTING CALL 🎬

Some connections change everything… even in the 
quietest moments.

The Days Between is a short film about two young men who meet by chance and slowly discover something deeper—through art, music, and the courage to be seen.

We are casting:
✨ JAYDEN – quiet, creative, guarded
✨ MARCUS – confident, warm, searching
📍 Birmingham, AL

This story centers Black LGBTQ+ love, vulnerability, and growth.

🎭 Submit: Headshot + Resume (if you have one) + Monologue/Self-tape
📧 Chyskyproductions@gmail.com

No deadline—just looking for the right people to bring this story to life.

Tag an actor. Share this. You never know who this is for.
#CastingCall #BlackLove #LGBTQFilm #BirminghamFilm #ActorsLife #IndieFilmmaking

We want to hear from you!'

items.title: Actors Needed:

items.text:
Aspiring Actor Looking for Opportunities 🎬
Hi everyone,
My name is Nathan Craft, also known as MC Crafty, and I’m looking to break into acting.
I’m based in Cambridge (originally from Essex) with a natural London/Essex accent. I’m happy to travel anywhere as I drive.
About me:
37 years old
6ft 2, slim build, bald
Mixed race (White & Black Caribbean)
Confident, energetic, and very outgoing
Not camera shy – I thrive in front of people
Although I haven’t had formal acting experience yet, performance has always been a big part of my life. I’m an MC/rapper, writing my own lyrics and performing at clubs and parties across the UK and internationally (Latvia & Switzerland), as well as live-stream radio shows.
In my day job, I manage a telesales team where I regularly deliver motivational talks and keep energy levels high — I’m known as a real “Mr Motivator” type. I also write my own scripts, so learning lines and bringing them to life is something I’m very comfortable with.
I’m looking for any acting opportunities — whether that’s TV, film, adverts, music videos, or stage — to get my foot in the door and prove what I can do.
If anyone is casting, knows someone, or can point me in the right direction, I’d really appreciate it 🙌

items.title: Aspiring Actor Looking for Opportunities 🎬

items.text:
Birmingham based
Looking for a variety of actors to fill the cast of our psychological thriller Daiquiri

Unpaid, expenses covered

27th April - 1st May

DAIQUIRI is a psychological thriller about Edward, a quiet, observant bartender who lives a double life as a serial killer. Behind the charm and routine of serving cocktails, he carefully studies the people who enter his bar, deciding who deserves to live and who does not.

One night he meets Fiona, a woman who treats him with unexpected kindness. For the first time, Edward hesitates. As he grows drawn to her, he is forced to confront something he has never experienced before in any real way: empathy.

The film explores loneliness, moral justification, and whether someone who believes they are a monster can ever choose differently. It is inspired by the psychological interiority of characters like Dexter and Joe Goldberg, but told in a more intimate, character-driven setting.

Edward does not see himself as evil. He sees himself as necessary.

Until Fiona makes him question that belief.

Reach out to @cavalryfilms on instagram to further discuss

This is all Free for the Film Industry Networking 🎬 why pay to meet film people we have over 3 hundred people coming to phoenix network meet up film people on the 14 April 2026 
Adam Richards and Never Give Up Phoenix Productions invite you to our monthly Film Networking Event in the heart of Mayfair. Whether you’re looking for your next big project or the right talent to bring your vision to life, this is the place to be.
📅 Date: April 14
📍 Location: Mayfair
🎟 Entry: Free
Who’s in the room?
• Directors & Producers
• Actors & Actresses
• Stunt Professionals
• Screenwriters
• Investors
Stop searching and start connecting. Join our community to stay updated on local opportunities and industry jobs.
👉 RSVP via Luma: https://luma.com/zdyu1v1k
👉 Join the WhatsApp Group: [Link]
👉 Visit our Website: https://www.nevergiveup-
Yes I did say Free

items.text:
🎭 MALE IMMERSIVE PERFORMER NEEDED – PAID OPPORTUNITY (£400) 🎭

Hi all! I’m Avgi, founder of Genome Theatre – we create high-end immersive and interactive experiences (murder mysteries, bespoke events, luxury parties).

We’re currently casting a male performer for an event on 25th April.

This is NOT a standard acting role – we’re specifically looking for someone with immersive / interactive performance experience.

You must be:
– Confident leading and presenting to groups
– Strong at improvisation and guest interaction
– Able to build atmosphere and “hold a room”
– Experienced in immersive theatre & events.

Details:
– Location: Amberley Castle
– Fee: approx. £400
– Role includes leading interactive games + being part of an immersive storyline

We’re also actively growing our performer team, so this could lead to regular paid work.

👉 Please ONLY apply if you have relevant immersive/interactive experience.

To apply:
– DM me or
– Email: info@genometheatre.co.uk
(Include a short intro + relevant experience/showreel if you have one)

You can see our work here:

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 16/2026

EIN KULTFILM IM ULTIMATE CUT, DIE INDOGENE BEVÖLKERUNG IM AMAZONAS UND MUMIENHORROR

Quentin Tarantinos Blutoper KILL BILL lief vor mehr als 20 Jahren in 2 Teilen, anno 2026 gibt's ein Revival in Form eines Filmes. 

Auf die Spuren des einheimischen Volkes begibt sich Richard Ladkani in YANUNI, DIE STIMME DES AMAZONAS. Wir konnten mit dem Regisseur der Doku ein Gespräch führen.

Universal Horror der 1930er Jahre anno 2026? Ja, das gibt es, wie stylisch die Neuinterpretation von Warner Bros ist (THE MUMMY), erzählt Ihnen unsere Moderatorin. 

Musikalisch gibt's neben der neuen Single von Shakira natürlich die beste Musik aus 90 Jahren Filmgeschichte. 

Mittwoch 15.4.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
Casting Asian Actors for some Proof-of-Concept scenes I'm shooting in the last week of April.

I'm putting together an Asian street gang (ie. Chinese, Korean, Japanese) project and am wanting to shoot a few short scenes for it. Basically guys and girls who are lounging around the streets of Vancouver, up to no good....

Inspiration are the Hong Kong triad films starring Andy Lau from the 1990's, would love to cast an Andy Lau type lead actor and some female gang leads. Bonus if the actor can speak Cantonese although this is not important.

The two character types are:

• Andy - 20's, independent, street smarts, living life the way he wants.

• Maggie - 20's, beautiful and either innocent or a gangster girl with a headstrong personality.

This is partly proof-of-concept, partly experimental and is on a volunteer basis but you will get footage for your reel.

Don't have exact dates yet but shooting will be between April 22nd to 27th.

Open to union and non-union actors.

If interested, please email me several professional photos (including one headshot and one full length photo) and resume to castingproject604@gmail.comNOSPAM. If you have video, send that along as well.

Thanks for reading.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, motorcycle and text that says 'Casting Asian Actors East Asian, Chinese, Korean, etc... RG500 for some scenes :วารี'

items.text:
**ULTRA SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

**NON-UNION - PAID HONORARIUM**

***“GOODBYE, FROM AFAR”***

**Director:** Kevin Jin Kwan Kim

**Producers:** Michael Ren, Bianca Rose Cheung, Nushi Sharma

**Category:** Ultra Short 1-Minute Film - Independent

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Compensation:** Paid honorarium ($100). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** May 23-24, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable).

**LOGLINE:** A young Korean kid navigates the death of a loved one from abroad, as his mother’s unspoken grief fractures their family.

**MINSEO **- ***Korean, Male, age 7–9*****.** Quiet, observant kid. He doesn’t fully understand what’s happening around him, but he feels all of it. He’s the kind of child who notices when the mood in a room changes, even when nobody says anything out loud. This role has minimal dialogue so the performance really lives in his face, stillness, and reactions. ****Korean-speaking preferred.*** ***MAIN.***

**MOM **- ***Korean, Female, late 20s to late 30s.*** Minseo’s mother. She’s carrying fresh grief while trying to hold herself together for her son. She moves through the day like someone split in two, doing what needs to be done, but emotionally somewhere else. Though she is in a state of deep sorrow, she does her best to keep it bottled up in front of her family. ****Must be fluent in Korean. SUPPORTING.***

**DAD **- ***Korean, Male, late 20s to late 30s.*** Minseo’s father. Calm, warm and steady, he is trying his best to keep the family afloat while his wife is falling apart. He’s gentle with Minseo and quietly supportive of Mom, but you can feel the weight on him too.*** *Must be fluent in Korean.*** ***SUPPORTING.***

**CHILD VERSION OF MOM **- ***East Asian, Female, age 7–9.*** A child version of Mom, appearing in the final emotional turn of the story. This role is brief but important. Looking for a young actor who can display deep sorrow in a natural, grounded performance.

topComments.text:
This is dance, not modeling.

Stop imposing height standards like 1m67+ — it honestly makes no sense. Dance is an art form, not a casting for mannequins who have to fit arbitrary criteria.

We’re here to express, to move, to create — not to meet superficial, outdated standards.

Do better
Sent you a dm on whatsapp,

items.text:
We’re so excited for our Acting for Screen Workshop, which is now fully booked and starting tomorrow!

Just a quick reminder to please bring:
🥪 A packed lunch
💦 Water
If you have a Majestic uniform, please wear it.
For new students, please come dressed in black or as close to black as possible.

This workshop is based around a really exciting new project we’re currently developing. We haven’t shared it publicly yet as it’s still in the writing stage, so you’ll be among the first to explore the material with us.

We can’t wait to get started and work with you all over the two days.

See you tomorrow! 🎬

#ActingForScreen #TalentAgency #Chester #PerformingArts #ActingClasses

AJESTIC'

For new students, please come dressed in black or as close to black as possible.

This workshop is based around a really exciting new project we’re currently developing. We haven’t shared it publicly yet as it’s still in the writing stage, so you’ll be among the first to explore the material with us.

We can’t wait to get started and work with you all over the two days.

See you tomorrow! 🎬

#ActingForScreen #TalentAgency #Chester #PerformingArts #ActingClasses
items.title: We’re so excited for our Acting for Screen Workshop, which is now fully booked and starting tomorrow!

items.text:
ISO Actress for a music video for a queer love story in Malibu beach. 
23rd April 9a-7p
The song is composed by a composer in France. Amazing, senior DP on set who worked on big productions, and our Costume Designer has worked in the Star Wars Mandalorian, How to get away with Murder and more. 
No kissing & no nudity. 
Any ethnicity welcome- unpaid, iMDb credits and travel compensation from LA
Please DM me or email at lilycadotofficial@gmail.com if available and interested, happy to share the moodboard and other details!

items.text:
NOW CASTING:
New short film project “Unforgettable.”

Please read below for the roles we are casting.

ROLE 1: Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

ROLE 2: Looking for a young 3-5 year old little girl- pale skin, (preferably) blonde hair, hazel / green / brown eyes. This role has no dialogue, one short scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me or @bellavlasis a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

items.title: NOW CASTING:

items.text:
**NOW CASTING POLY LOVE!**

TV Producers are searching for polyamorous and poly-curious people to **star in their own TV Docu-series!**

Are you in a relationship and are **curious about exploring polyamory?**

Are you already in a **polyamorous relationship?**

Whether you’re part of an existing **THROUPLE, QUAD, or PENTAD**

**OR you’re newly exploring polyamory.**

**WE WANT TO HEAR FROM YOU!**

To be considered or to nominate a family, please email **[polytvcasting@gmail.com](mailto:polytvcasting@gmail.com)** with the following info:

1. Your Name(s) and Location.

2. Contact info.

3. Tell us a little bit about your family and your lives.

4. Attach some family photos.

5. Include any social media links that can help us get to know you better.

items.text:
#Bydgoszcz #non-profit #aktor #samochód #tesla 

Cześć! Do mojego niezależnego filmu krótkometrażowego szukam:

* aktora w wieku 25-30 lat

ORAZ

* samochodu elektrycznego marki Tesla, docelowo biały Model 3. Pojazd w projekcie nie jest eksploatowany - nie porusza się. Stanowi bardziej element scenograficzny - bohaterowie w nim siedzą, wychodzą.  

Realizowany film to krótka historia, łącząca z jednej strony konwencję telewizyjnego spotu kampanii, z drugiej natomiast klimat i motywy kina gangsterskiego z końca ubiegłego wieku, dodając motoryzację w tle (albo i na pierwszym planie). Odrobina humoru, trochę sarkazmu i spojrzenie przez krzywe zwierciadło na ducha epoki.

Zdjęcia będą realizowane w Bydgoszczy, pod koniec kwietnia lub ewnetualnie w pierwszej połowie maja. Zainteresowanych proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej lub mailowo: [blazej.budzbon@icloud.com](mailto:blazej.budzbon@icloud.com)

items.text:
❤️ HEJKA KOCHANI! CASTING DO SERIALU! ❤️

Szukamy aktorów do serialu – każda z poniższych postaci to główna rola w jednym odcinku! ✨

To świetna okazja, żeby:
🎥 zdobyć doświadczenie na planie
🤝 poznać fantastyczną ekipę
🔥 przeżyć super przygodę
💰 i przy okazji dobrze zarobić!

STAWKA: 1000 zł / dzień zdjęciowy
Każda rola to 2–3 dni zdjęciowe (czyli nawet 2000–3000 zł)

⭐️Przyjmujemy zgłoszenia z całej Polski!⭐️

🎭 AKTUALNE ROLE:

👩 JULIA (23–28 lat)
📅 24–26 maja
Czarująca, z pięknym uśmiechem, regularne rysy twarzy, ładna figura. Na co dzień spodnie i kok – nawyk zawodowy.

👩 BEATA (38–42 lata)
📅 22–24 maja
Zadbana, atrakcyjna, z fajną fryzurą (pracuje w tym zawodzie), przyciąga uwagę.

👩 ELIZA (22–26 lat)
📅 24–26 maja
Ładna, dość wysoka, stylowa i nowoczesna. ⚠️ Wymagana umiejętność tańca (walc).

👩 DANKA (23–25 lat)
📅 22–24 maja
Niewysoka, niepozorna, na co dzień luźny styl. W historii przebiera się za chłopaka.

👩 ANETA (38–43 lata)
📅 12–14 maja lub 27–29 kwietnia
Łagodna, zadbana, naturalna, o ciepłym wyrazie twarzy.

👩 JUDYTA (23–26 lat)
📅 22–24 maja
Pielęgniarka – energiczna, otwarta, atrakcyjna. Styl raczej skromny, w scenach szpitalnych strój medyczny.

👨 MAREK (26–30 lat)
📅 12–14 maja
Wysoki, sympatyczny, zadbany, z ujmującym uśmiechem.

💌ZGŁOSZENIA: AKTORZY@UNAGIMEDIA.PL
 Tytuł maila: S + wybrana postać

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• numer telefonu
• zdjęcie portretowe + sylwetki
• wideowizytówkę (obowiązkowo!)
• informację o szkole aktorskiej i doświadczeniu

Szczegóły przekażemy wybranym osobom

Nie zwlekaj – może to właśnie Twoja rola! 🎭
DO USŁYSZENIA! 💫

items.title: Hi everyone!

items.text:
Quick question for filmmakers/casting directors..

Have you ever posted a casting call across multiple platforms and ended up with hundreds (or even thousands) of submissions scattered across emails, DMs, and different sites?

It gets messy fast, things get lost, and reviewing becomes overwhelming.

I’m currently building something to simplify this by bringing all submissions into one organized place where you can review, shortlist, and track everything easily.

I’m testing it with live projects right now and setting up custom submission links for casting calls so everything comes in structured instead of chaotic, completely free while I’m in this testing phase.

If you’re about to post a casting call and want to try it, I’m happy to set it up for your project.

Hello all! We're urgently!! looking for multiple female/femme-presenting extras for our student short film that will begin shooting over the next two weeks (further detail soon), please contact the following email if interested - directorsfrontier@gmail.com 

All of this will be background work and no speaking parts! These are also unpaid roles as we are unable to offer payment as students but we will provide craft services.

sharedPost.text:
They’re coming from Tallahassee… are YOU coming? 👀🔥

We felt the love at KidsFest, and now we’re bringing that same energy to Ringgold, GA!

Join us for GA Summer Country Fest 2026 — a day filled with live music, family fun, vendors, and a community experience you don’t want to miss.

🎤 Featuring The Demi Godzz 
⭐ Special Guest: Tae Lewis from The Voice 

🗓 May 10 
📍 The Colonnade | Ringgold, GA 

Bring your family, invite your friends, and come be part of the experience.

Limited vendor spots still available.

#ExtremeDreamsEvents #GASummerCountryFest #FamilyFun #LiveMusic #CommunityVibes

items.text:
🎬 FREE SHOWREEL EDITING
Looking to upgrade your showreel?

We’re offering professional, cinematic showreel edits — completely free as part of our portfolio development at GraySmythStudio.

In return, selected reels may be featured in our portfolio.

✔ Industry-standard editing

✔ Strong pacing & storytelling

✔ Tailored to your performance

✔ Ready to share

🎯 Limited spots available

📲 To enquire, fill out the form in our bio

Selected applicants only

⸻

#Showreel #ActorsLife #CastingReady #Filmmaking #VideoEditing #ContentCreators #ActingCareer #CreativeIndustry #Editors #UKCreatives

sharedPost.text:
NICCI TOPPING WORKSHOP
£28.00

NICCI TOPPING ACTING WORKSHOP

19TH APRIL 4:15PM -6:15PM

FEE: £28

NICCI TOPPING (CSA, CDA) has been a leading casting director in the UK for 25 years, casting over 50 films and TV series and delivering countless workshops and masterclasses across the industry

Actors she has cast include Whoopi Goldberg, Evanna Lynch, Sophie McShera, Tara Fitzgerald and Peter Firth, and she was involved in casting leading actors such as Olivia Cooke, Daisy Ridley and Robert James Collier at the start of their careers.

She is a passionate exponent for education within the industry and has sat on boards in the UK and internationally at Cannes, the London Film Festival and the the BBC, amongst others, passing on her wealth of experience on industry craft.  She is the former chair of the CSA’s committee in Europe and is active in helping shape the industry’s push on Inclusion & Diversity.

As an active educator delivers over 30 workshops a year working with many leading agencies and for companies like Screen Yorkshire and also with education partners such as the Northern Film School, Liverpool Institute of Performing Arts, Leeds Beckett University, Barnsley College, Huddersfield University, York St John’s and The Royal Birmingham Conservatoire. Click here to book https://screenplayacting.com/product/nicci-topping-workshop-2/

items.text:
‼️CREW CALL‼️

This is last minute but given some scheduling circumstances JCM Productions needs to fill some essential roles. Given the situation of having a lot of extras on 2 or the 3 day listed below anyone that works in a high capacity environment will be crucial to accomplishing tasks effectively and efficiently in this particular case in the long run.

PROJECT TITLE
--------------------------
Where The Road Ends

PROJECT TYPE
--------------------------
NON-UNION Feature Film

ABOUT THE PROJECT
———————————-
This revolves around a couple going through relationship issues and the friends that try to get their mind off the distaste for each other and while being in town only to go the exact opposite of what was intended. This indie project embraces creativity, collaboration, and experimental storytelling to change things up from the conventional way productions operate to unraveling stories in this case.

SYNOPSIS
—————-
A Romance Drama centers around a couple dealing with the trials and tribulations of a failing relationship and the friends that serve as the voices of reason and reality behind how an initial mistake turns into something far more life changing trying to deal with the consequences and closure to move forward to lead a better life than to live in tragedy.

SHOOTING DETAILS
———————————
📍 Location: Seattle, WA (must be local in PNW)
📅 Dates: April 23rd-25th (Thursday-Saturday)
🎬 Compensation: Food + IMDb credit provided.

SEEKING: 

🔹 GAFFER
• Looking to bring on someone that identifies small details in natural and artificial lighting with outstanding adaptability to achieve great and quality visuals through accents in addition to variations of painterly values in both color and ranging temperatures in any case.

🔹 INTIMACY COORDINATOR 
• Require a trained and full certified not just course applicate with a skill set and knowledge for a passionate kissing moment in 1-3 instances that allow the two talents participating to feel as comfortable and relaxed as possible and know how to stay engaged and detract with necessary.

🔹 2ND AD
• Achieve a talented Second Assistant Director to help the team stay organized, on schedule, and keep the production running as smoothly as possible especially on the time limit and want to have that person be able to keep positive morale for the long day when the time calls for it. In addition manage Crafty and keep Actors active and tracked so as to deliver on great performances throughout the process.

TO SUBMIT
——————
📩 Email matthewmckinney18@gmail.com with:
✅ Reels/Reference Videos of Prior Projects or Letter References
✅ Resume if applicable

topComments.text: Last minute, essential roles but no pay. Sooooo...not essential then. Work for free...on a feature film 🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣

items.text:
Hi Everyone! 

Lots of spam in this group lately. Not sure who is approving some of these posts, but I am doing my best to go through and delete what I can as much as possible. Thank you all for your comments and questions flagging things for me! 

Just a reminder, this group is only for JOB POSTINGS! No festival promotions, announcements, trailers, information/updates, actor posts etc. It's a group for actors and filmmakers to find jobs. 

Thanks! 

-Vanessa

**A BEAUTIFUL TOMORROW**

USC Student Sci-Fi Short Film

CASTING: 18+ Background Extras for BUNKER TENANTS in a dystopian 2071 LA. 

LOS ANGELES - Arts District **April 18th & 19th**

Copy, Credit, Meals + Copy of any Footage you’re in!

Sign up Form: Scan QR Code below. Build a World with us 🌎

sharedPost.text:
📣📣CASTING📣📣

Zapraszamy na dwuetapowy casting, z pierwszym etapem online! Szukamy aktorki w wieku 18+ do zagrania w spektaklu - bajce kurdyjskiej na podstawie książki "Opowieści Dengbeżów. Baśnie i bajki kurdyjskie". Mile widziane są umiejętności animacji, gdyż w spektaklu wykorzystamy animację lalką.

Premiera spektaklu jest planowana na początek czerwca, próby do spektaklu w maju w weekendy oraz w trakcie majówki w Zamościu (woj. lubelskie) oraz Kielcach (woj. świętokrzyskie), stąd wymagamy dostępności w tym okresie.

Eksploatację spektaklu planujemy w lato 2026 w trakcie festiwali (m.in. Pol'and'Rock Festiwal w Strefie Warsztatów ASP) dlatego dostępność w czerwcu, lipcu i sierpniu również jest dla nas ważna.

📣📣 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila: fundacjabanina@gmail.com 📣📣

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: 
✅ twoje CV
✅ wizytówkę, w formie linku do YouTube

❗Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 23 kwietnia❗

Casting może się przedłużyć, w przypadku gdy w wyznaczonym czasie nie znajdziemy odpowiedniej osoby.

O zakończeniu castingu poinformujemy na naszych social mediach tj. Facebook i Instagram

POL' AND'ROCK FESTIWAL), NA FESTIWALAC w OSRODKACH KULTURYI SZKOŁACH OFERTA PŁATNA CZEKAMY NA TWOJE CV WIZYTÓWKĘ NA MAIL: fundacjabanina@gmail.com fundacjabat TERMIN PRZESYŁANIA ZGŁOSZEŃ: 23 KWIETNIA 2026'

items.text:
Hello @everyone,

With a website still being constructed at this point I figured it was a perfect time to no longer put this off. The official day and hourly rates of my entire film/media independent career. There are exceptions to some independent artists that if you know you know but otherwise this will be the blueprint for for the large scale marketof companies, registered businesses, and other similar entities. 

***Independent clients will be separate conversations and meetings on a case by case basis in any circumstance at this time as things continue growing.***

Film & Media Contractor Rates

Cinematographer - Half Day Rate - $625
Cinematographer - Full Day Rate - $1250

Videographer - Half Day Rate - $500
Videographer - Full Day Rate - $1000

Photographer - Half Day Rate - $450
Photographer - Full Day Rate - $900

02

Message me directly your Instagram or portfolio with photos included  and comment here so I know you are interested sometimes messages get lost

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL - FEATURE FILM 🎬

We are currently casting adult actors for an upcoming feature film and are honoured to have now been given the opportunity to begin casting children for this production on behalf of the filmmakers.

A key role requires portraying one character from birth to 4 years old, and we are now seeking:

Caucasian girls across the following age ranges:
Newborn / up to 6 months
6-18 months
18 months - 3 years
3-4 years

Role Note:

This role represents the same child across multiple ages, so we are especially keen to find children who share similar features and overall appearance.

We strongly encourage submissions from:
Siblings or family members who resemble each other
Children with a similar look (facial structure, colouring, etc.)

Details:

Any hair colour considered
No previous acting experience required

Applications must be submitted by a parent or legal guardian

Filming location and dates TBC

📩 To apply, please send:
Child’s name & date of birth
Recent, clear photographs (no filters, no dummies, no hats, no big bows)
Parent/guardian contact details
Current location

Email: info@majesticacademyofperformingarts.co.uk

Subject: Feature Film Casting - Girl Age & Name 

We are excited to begin this process and would greatly appreciate any shares.

Thank you 🎬

Przyjdź, odkryj swój talent i przeżyj coś wyjątkowego ✨

items.text:
WESTWARD - Student western directed by Nico Guin
A teenage outlaw returns home with a “Wanted —Dead or Alive” poster bearing his face, forcing a silent, heartbreaking reunion with the mother he left behind before he walks into the sunset to face the consequences of a past he can’t escape.

Looking for an older, female actor to play the mother in this 2-3 minute silent western.

This character is in her 40’s or 50’s, is loving yet heartbroken and distraught at the sight of her outlaw son.

Roles are not paid or promised.

We will be shooting during the month of April, and￼ are pretty flexible as it should be only one set. If you are interested or have any questions, you can reach out to me ￼at 914900@dpsk12.net or 7202552717. Thank you!

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn i kobiet ( Gliwice/Katowice )**

 

Szukamy skarbu Zakonu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!

 

Jesteśmy grupą pasjonatów składającą się z osób z różnym doświadczeniem filmowym i miejscem zamieszkania. Spotykamy się 1 2 razy w miesiącu na sesjach testowych i video w wybrane niedziele, ustalane 1 2 tygodnie wcześniej. Projekt realizujemy na terenie Gliwic.

** **

**Kolejne nasze spotkanie to 26.04.26 i 03.05.26 ( Niedziela )   godz. 10:30 - 15:00**

 

Nasza Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **poszukuje chętną osobę do projektu niekomercyjnego mini serialu osadzonego głównie w 1940 roku. Najlepiej jakby takie osoby były  ** z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrza czy Katowice najdalej.**

 

1 – Rycerz Zakonu Templariuszy wiek: 40 – 50 z zarostem, kwestie po francusku

2 – Ojciec głównej bohaterki ‘’Antoni’’ ( Polak ) wiek: 35 – 40, kilka odcinków kwestie po Polsku

3 – Podoficer niemiecki Waffen SS ( Niemiec ) wiek: 25 – 40, bez zarostu, kwestie po niemiecku

4 – Zastępczyni szefa Ahnenerbe ( Niemka ) wiek: 25 – 30, kilka odcinków, kwestie po Niemiecku

5 – Oficer francuski wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, 1 scena kwestie po francusku

6 – Wujek głównej bohaterki ‘’Leon’’( Polak ) wiek: 40 – 45, kilka odcinków, kwestie po Polsku

7 – Niemiecki żołnierz wiek: 20 – 40 bez zarostu, 2 odcinki kwestie po niemiecku

8 – Niemiecki żandarm wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, kwestie po niemiecku, 2 odcinki

** **

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
Agencja Statystów Merito z WFDiF w Warszawie

poszukuje grupy 30 statystów w wieku 25-60 lat

do nagrań reklamy Supermarketu w dniu: 21.04.2026

Zainteresowane osoby, mieszkające tylko i wyłącznie w Warszawie (bo w Warszawie jest nagranie) prosimy o zgłoszenie przez formularz do piątku (17.04) do godz. 16:

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScyIURvXvPMMnA_MwvLFiniNwx3m2a2p8PtcdqpAPBptUUWcg/viewform?usp=publish-editor

Zdjęcia muszą być koniecznie podpisane w nazwie pliku według szablonu: Jan Kowalski01 

Wynagrodzenie jak za statystowanie w reklamie,

dokładną wysokość podamy po zgłoszeniu w formularzu.

Trzeba sobie zarezerwować całą dniówkę bo nie wiemy ile to dokładnie potrwa.

Nagrania mogą potrwać cały dzień, od rana do nocy,

zwyczajowo plan filmowy trwa 12 godzin i na tyle należy być dyspozycyjnym w przypadku zgłoszenia. Sceny będą nagrywane na zewnątrz.

Pasujące osoby do tego statystowania które są już u nas zarejestrowane dostały już od nas informację. Kto już nam się zgłosił bezpośrednio prosimy nie zgłaszać się już dodatkowo przez formularz.

Prosimy o zgłoszenia do piątku (17.04) do godz. 16 to wyślemy zdjęcia do produkcji.

Następnie będziemy informować wybrane przez produkcję osoby.

Możliwość długofalowej współpracy.

Zespół Merito

www.agencjamerito.pl

We’re casting for our brand-new Summer 2026 production – The Antics Party Show!

From theatres to holiday parks and venues across the UK, this is your chance to join a high-energy, professional show team delivering incredible entertainment nationwide.

items.text:
Casting French-speaking teens for educational videos!

If you are or know a 14-21 year old who speaks French FLUENTLY, can work in central London and who can speak confidently and enthusiastically in front of a camera then please apply!

We will be filming on one weekend this summer (date TBC). We pay around £40-50 per video which is usually around 2 hours of filming time.

To apply send a 30-60 second video in French telling us about you and why you'd be great for this role to rhiggins@scholastic.co.uk.

Please pass this on to anyone who may be interested.

Merci beaucoup !

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'CASTING FRENCH-SPEAKING TEENS FOR EDUCATIONAL VIDEOS YOUNG PEOPLE AGED BETWEEN 14 AND 21 YEARS OLD REQUIREMENTS: native French speaker (from any French-speaking French country) who can travel to London for a day's filming. Interested? Send a 30-second audition video telling us who you are and why you'd be great for this project to higgins@scholastic.co.uk as soon as possible. This isa paid role.'

🎬 CASTING CALL — HARD KNOTS 🎬

We're building something real out here in ATL.

Hard Knots is an original one-hour street drama set on Atlanta's Westside. Season 1 is in production and we are NOW looking for talent.

📍 Set in Atlanta, GA
🎭 All roles. All backgrounds.
🔞 Rated R — this one ain't for everybody
💰 Unpaid / Deferred Compensation

If you got the look, the hunger, and the range — we want to hear from you.

📩 Send us a DM with your name, age range, headshot, and reel.

Let's make history. ATL, this is for us. 🖤

#HardKnots #CastingCall #ATL #Atlanta #IndieFilm #StreetDrama #ActorsOfATL #AtlantaFilm #BlackFilm #NewSeries #CastingATL

items.text:
Introducing K.A Global© an Award Winning Production House and a innovative Creative Powerhouse, proudly established in the UK, operating at the forefront of the Entertainment Industry since 2020.
Specialising in Film, Music, Media, Performing Arts, and Events, we are more than a production company, we are a creative team built to develop, support, and elevate talents both on-screen and behind the scenes. 

Rapidly growing as a brand, K.A Global combines: 

🎥 Film Production & Creative Direction 

🎤 Music Production & Artist Development 

🎭 Talent Agency Hub/Casting Platform & Brand Coaching Development 

🎧 Audio & Videography Supply for Events 

📺 Content Creation for Streaming Platforms 

We are proud to be recognised as an Award Winning Creative Brand, with a mission to become a Global household name representing Excellence, Diversity, and Innovation.

items.text:
WARSZAWA - FILM FABULARNY - KOSMONAUTA
DZIEŃ ZDJĘCIOWY - 21.04

CHARAKTERYZACJA (mężczyźni) - 18.04

Do filmu fabularnego szukam statystów oraz epizodystów do jednej sceny w roli fotoreporterów / dziennikarzy. 

STATYŚCI

- Panie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 130 zł (dzień zdjęciowy bez charakteryzacji)

- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 200 zł (dzień zdjęciowy 130zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)

EPIZODYŚCI

- Panowie - w wieku ok. 20-50 lat - stawka → 270 zł (dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl

W tytule maila: K21 (statysta lub epizodysta)

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wizytówkę (jeżeli to zgłoszenie do epizodu) wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie!

POD TYTUŁEM agata@podtytulem.pl'

🙏Mała prośba do Was moi mili 🙏

Wrzuciłem właśnie na YouTube moje nowe demo aktorskie (acting reel) – kilka scen z produkcji, w których grałem w ostatnich latach. 

Jeśli macie minutę, wejdźcie proszę na YOUTUBE w link i:

 zostawcie łapkę pod filmem

 napiszcie krótki komentarz na YouTube (nawet  albo )

To bardzo pomaga algorytmowi pokazać film dalej.

Jestem też ciekaw jednej rzeczy –

czy ktoś z Was kojarzy mnie z któregoś serialu? 

Link do filmu:

items.title: Our 5 day intensive course is coming again soon!

items.text:
Thanks!

I’m an actor, producer, and investing producer—always looking to collaborate on strong, character-driven projects. I’m able and willing to travel, and can cover my own accommodation when needed.

items.text:
Hi there, 

I’m a UK TV producer working on a documentary series for a US streamer, and we’re looking for two actors to take part in some stylised visual scenes. there’s no dialogue involved, just naturalistic reactions and performance.

It’s a paid role, and we’re working on a fairly quick turnaround, with filming scheduled for Monday or Tuesday next week in Los Angeles.

As this is a look alike role I'm looking for two boys aged 18 upwards but with playing age of around 16. both need to have dark hair and brown eyes.

If this sounds like you please email me with a recent selfie- lisa.gomerhowes@raw.co.uk

many thanks,

Lisa

[https://www.imdb.com/name/nm4073700/](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm4073700/)

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL: IDENTICAL TWINS (GIRLS, 10–12)

We’re scouting identical twin girls across South Africa for an upcoming paid feature film shooting in Cape Town (June–September 2026).

✨ Requirements:
• Identical twin girls
• Ages 10–12
• Mixed race / ethnically ambiguous look
• Must have a valid SA or international passport (travel to Belgium required)

This is an exciting international opportunity for young talent to be part of a major production 🌍

📩 To apply:
Email: studio@zestcasting.com

Include:
• Recent photos of both twins
• Names & ages
• Contact details
• Where they are based

⏰ Deadline: 13 April 2026

Tag parents, friends, schools, or agents who might know the perfect twins! 

#twins #southafrica #casting #featurefilm #capetowncasting #zestcasting

items.text:
**CALL FOR VOICES: Immigrant Actors in the UK**

Hi everyone! I’m an anthropology master’s student at UCL working on a creative research project.

I’m looking to better understand the lived experience of immigrant actors in the UK.  If you’re an international actor aged 18+, I’d really love to hear your perspective!

To take part, you just answer three simple questions.
Even a few lines is enough.

No pressure - it can be raw, messy, poetic, funny, honest. You can respond in writing or via voice note, and you can choose to remain anonymous.

You’re also invited (completely optional) to share something creative that captures your experience - a poem, photo, drawing, monologue, dance, or anything else.

**That’s it.**

Your response will become part of a multivoiced digital artwork / exhibition built from real lived experiences.

If you’d like to take part, please follow the link below.
items.title: Voices from Another Stage🎤
items.groupTitle: Casting Connect UK (Actors, Filmmakers, Casting Directors)

🔥 virtual camp I found for the kids this summer! The owner is a Broadway performer with over 20 yrs of experience Jarran Stepney Muse on and off of Broadway stages globally! My kids cant wait! Spaces are limited and the free information sessions are coming up next week! 
Here's some info I grabbed from the site below.

Help Your Teen Build Confidence, Stage Presence & Leadership-On Stage and in Life

Free info session for parents of young performers ages 12-17.

•    How to help your child build real confidence
•    What most young performers are missing

•    What your child will experience in just 4 weeks

**CASTING CALL – MUSIC VIDEO SHORT FILM**
**“SNIFFING OUT TROUBLE”**
From ThunderKnight Entertainment Ltd.

Casting for the high-energy music video follow-up to the feature film *HEAVY WEAPON*.

We are seeking **female actors (ages 18–50)** with **basic dance experience** for a stylized, story-driven scene set inside a dance studio, where investigators uncover clues tied to a mysterious crime.

🎬 **What You Get:**
• IMDb credit
• Gas stipend
• Professional-quality footage & photography for your demo reel

🔥 This is a dynamic, cinematic shoot blending performance, movement, and storytelling — perfect for talent looking to expand their reel with something bold and visually striking.

📩 **To Submit:**
Send headshot + contact info to: **Thunderknightltd@gmail.com**
📱 Or text: **720-569-7460** for details

items.text:
CASTING!!!!!

S.E.B. Casting is casting real families to be in a PSA for the National Forest Foundation. 

Looking for authentic families of 4-5. 
2 Parents between 30-45, 
2 children between 4-8, or one boy between 8-10 & one girl between 11-13 plus her best friend same age 
1 Grandparent over 50 (if available)
Also looking for a family dog! 

Ideal candidates are fun loving, comfortable, friendly, enjoy the outdoors, but do not need to be super athletic or ultra granola types, just regular families who like to go into the forest for a fun day or weekend. All types! All ethnicities! No film or television experience necessary! 

Pay rate is $1400 per person 

Usage is: 60 plus :30, :15, :4 x :06 LIFTS
Terms: One year from first use date, May 16, 2026. Usage covers theatrical release, national broadcast, all linear TV/CTV, online/digital/Internet video, paid and unpaid social media, OOH, and stills (print, paid/unpaid social, online, and OOH). Option to renew for Year 2 and each subsequent year, not to exceed +10% per talent. Theatrical Release=AMC. They run a free PSA for NFF annually.

Shoot Date is April 30 near Bailey

If you or someone you know is interested, please send a recent family photo (selfies are ok!), a list of everybody’s name and age, and a few sentences about what you love about the outdoors or what is your favorite thing to do in the forest to shauna@sebcasting.com with NFF in the subject line by April 12th. 

Can’t wait to see you play in the woods!!!

CASTING – COMEDIC LEGAL WEB SERIES (DENVER)

Filming a fast-paced, absurd legal comedy (think serious courtroom drama… but completely ridiculous).

Looking for multiple roles (male & female, 20s–50s):
- Confident / over-the-top personalities
- Deadpan / dry humor types
- Big character energy a plus

Shoot details:
 Denver area
 Flexible shoot days (May–June)
 Non-paid 

This is a dialogue-heavy, character-driven project — strong comedic timing matters more than experience.

To submit:
- Headshot (or recent photo)
- Short clip (if you have one) OR quick intro video

DM me.

If you’re funny, confident, or just want to play a ridiculous lawyer — you’ll fit somewhere.

sharedPost.text:
Paid TEEN*
story tellers wanted for May Festival Performance 
$25 stipends will be paid to 4-5 performers 

*Atomic theatre Atomic teen program prides itself on creating performance opportunities for young actors to showcase their skills.  

We have been invited to participate in the The Wheat Ridge Historical Society May festival Saturday, May 9 from 10 to 2 at the Wheat Ridge Historical Society Park 4610 N Robb Street. 

Actors dressed in Pioneer or Victorian fashions wanted to read children’s stories at two separate story hours scheduled around the dancing of the May Pole (active performance time approximately one hour) 

AUDITIONS:  Saturday, May 2 10 AM at the Wheat Ridge Grange  3850 High Court 
To reserve your spot email Deletta at atomictheatreinc@gmail.com   
Subject May Festival 

Prepare a reading of a book or song that fits the pioneer/Victorian or May Day theme

We are able to compensate our performers and support young artists. Thanks in part to community donations and a grant from. Wheat Ridge Cultural Commission

For more information about our youth programming visit www.atomictheatre.org 

Image from our pirate themed story hour featuring Mckenna, Autumn, Forrest , Bodhi , Leona and Thunder one of our Reading With The Rabbits
